reasoning: The FRED data shows a clear upward trend in the Federal Reserve's balance sheet (series WALCL) since early December 2025, increasing in 12 of the last 14 weeks. Web search results confirm the Federal Reserve officially ended its Quantitative Tightening (QT) program on December 1, 2025, moving into a new phase of balance sheet expansion to stabilize market liquidity. Given this definitive policy shift and the strong recent track record of consistent weekly growth, there is a high probability that the total assets will increase over the one-week period from March 11 (the value available on March 15) to March 18 (the value available on March 22).
